redmarkEradicatorTacticsPower.title: Snipe Priority
REDMARK_ERADICATOR_TACTICS_POWER.title: Snipe Priority
redmarkEradicatorTacticsPower.descriptio: While [gold]"Redmark" Infiltrator[/gold] is alive, [gold]"Redmark" Eradicator[/gold] will use its higher-damage Snipe move.

saintguardShieldPower.title: Saintguard Shield
SAINTGUARD_SHIELD_POWER.title: Saintguard Shield
saintguardShieldPower.description: [gold]Bozhokasti, Saintguard Gunner[/gold] reduces all damage he takes by an amount equal to this power's stacks. The first time he dies, he revives and enters phase two.

lugalszargusDecisivePower.title: Decisive Duel
LUGALSZARGUS_DECISIVE_POWER.title: Decisive Duel
lugalszargusDecisivePower.description: [gold]Lugalszargus, King of the Calendar[/gold] targets all other units with attacks. When [gold]Haranduh Khan, Whip of the Earth[/gold] dies, [gold]Lugalszargus, King of the Calendar[/gold] gains [blue]10[/blue] Strength.
